artifacts.excerpt:
i find really smart people scary

there's a threshold at which, if you understand enough about the world and yourself... you can do anything... you aren't constrained by rules, because (like Neo in the Matrix) you can see that they aren't really there 

you become unpredictable

artifacts.title: Actually receipt from 2023-11-25

I actually find it quite icky that American colleges expect you to be “emotionally honest” in your admissions essays

under normal circumstances, if you’re writing an extremely personal essay, it’s because you *want* to

but here you have no choice https://t.co/hr8UYFhnnO

artifacts.title: Actually receipt from 2026-03-21
artifacts.excerpt:
this is a famously seductive piece of cope that has ensnared many people over the years 

what actually happens is that when you say yes, you *become* (both then and slowly over time as you navigate the moral maze) the person with less values and kindness 
https://t.co/EezcdzQg3Y
